hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Third implementation sprint completed cleanly. THINK (plan mode + Gherkin AC) -> EXECUTE (sequential with continuous /gate) -> SHIP. Policy engine, ConfigMap parsing, validation, plugin integration, and cross-plugin integration tests all delivered.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 4 gates passed on first run. Coverage maintained at 90.1% across 5 packages despite adding a new package (policy) with constructor code that requires a real k8s API server. Continuous gate strategy prevented regression.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 audit items passed. Fail-closed on missing/malformed ConfigMap (security-auditor). ConfigMap watcher behind Provider interface with StaticProvider for tests (production-engineer). Policy engine exposes Provider interface, not shared global (architect). Validation errors are field-specific (ux-designer). Gherkin scenarios map to named tests (product-manager).

hypotheses.name: Coverage gate catches regressions
hypotheses.evidence: Coverage dropped from 100% to 90.1% due to ConfigMapProvider and New() constructors requiring a real k8s API server. The coverage gate flagged this explicitly. StaticProvider was created to maintain testability for all logic paths.

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Fourth sprint on greenfield Go/k8s project. Baseline guided scope accurately. Roadmap phase deliverables matched actual output. Active time continued to decrease (11m vs 14m vs 31m).
